If it doesn't work out for me, what are my options?

If it doesn’t work out for you, you can return your Mesa Loop 30oz as long as it’s unused and in its original packaging. We make returns easy—just start the process on our website within 30 days of receiving your order. That way, you can shop with confidence knowing you have options!
